dict.string: WiFi Troubleshooter uses your location to read nearby Wi-Fi network names (SSIDs) so it can detect channel interference, evil-twin APs, and recommend a better channel.
WiFi Troubleshooter uses your location to read nearby Wi-Fi network names (SSIDs) so it can detect channel interference, evil-twin APs, and recommend a better channel.
WiFi Troubleshooter scans the local network to discover devices (routers, switches, cameras, printers) and measure latency to the gateway.
